title: Physical stocktake
subtitle: Count real on-hand per location, compare with expected, and apply adjustments
emptyDesc: Open a count on a location to snapshot the expected on-hand and record the real stock.
failedToLoadDesc: Could not load the count sessions. Check your connection and retry.
cancelMessage: Cancel this count? Recorded lines will be lost.
deleteMessage: Delete this count? This cannot be undone.

create.title: New physical count
create.desc: Pick a location: the system snapshots the expected contents (batches, serials and bulk) and opens the count.

count.title: Counting
count.scanPlaceholder: Scan or type a serial / batch…
count.scanHelper: A match focuses the corresponding row.

review.title: Variance review
review.desc: Only rows where expected and counted differ. Apply to generate the adjustment movements.
review.uncountedCount: {{count}} rows have not been counted yet.
review.movementsWarning: Warning: there are movements on this location after the snapshot. The expected may be stale.
review.applyMessage: ADJUSTMENT movements will be created for every variance. This is final and the count becomes read-only.
